improvements.change: Explicitly require host-storage RBAC for identity-based AzureWebJobsStorage (Blob + Queue roles) whenever allowSharedKeyAccess is false.
improvements.rationale: Prevents runtime host storage authorization failures for Function App startup and checkpoints.

improvements.change: Require adding environment-specific deployment parameters and validating with az deployment group create in the implementation step.
improvements.rationale: Makes acceptance criterion for staging deployment success testable and reproducible.

improvements.change: Instruct agent not to commit generated Bicep build outputs (e.g., infra/main.json) unless explicitly requested.
improvements.rationale: Keeps PRs focused on source IaC and prevents generated-file drift.
